findings.description: step_timings is only written on the success path, inside the try: block after all operations succeed. Any exception earlier (LLM call, zh-TW guard, DB write, shop_tags write) discards the partial timings collected up to that point. Plan acceptance criterion #3 explicitly requires: 'Handlers that fail mid-run write partial step timings without affecting the failure outcome.' Fix: move the job_queue.update({'step_timings': step_timings}) call into a finally: block (keep contextlib.suppress(Exception) wrapper), or mirror it in the except branch before raise.
Same acceptance-criterion violation as enrich_shop: step_timings write is happy-path only; exception branch persists nothing. Move the update into a finally: block wrapped in contextlib.suppress.
Same acceptance-criterion violation: partial timings on exception are not persisted. Move to finally:.

Same acceptance-criterion violation: step_timings write only runs after _batch_write succeeds. If fetch_photos, classify, or _batch_write raises, partial timings are lost. This handler has no try/except, so wrapping in a try/finally is the cleanest fix.

JOB_TYPE_OPTIONS dropdown still lists only ['all','enrich_shop','generate_embedding','scrape_shop']. This PR instruments four handlers including summarize_reviews and classify_shop_photos, but admins cannot filter to those job types to inspect the new timing UI. Pre-existing omission, but touching this file is the natural moment to fix.

job_id = cast('str', job_id) erases the str|None type. Later guard at line 188 (if job_id is not None) is dead to mypy but still meaningful at runtime. Pre-existing pattern in this file; noting for awareness only.

notes: Task tool unavailable in this session — discovery agents executed inline. Codex adversarial review also unavailable (disable-model-invocation on Skill). Test Philosophy and Design Quality gates passed with no findings.

re_verify_pass_2.summary: All 4 Important (finally: blocks) and 2 Minor (RawJobsList options, enrich_shop cast annotation) issues confirmed resolved. No regressions introduced. classify_shop_photos uses try/finally without except (correct pattern for this handler). The generate_embedding cancellation test correctly mocks job_queue at the DB boundary and asserts the step_timings write via job_queue_table.update.assert_called_once(). job_id is 'job-cancelled-2' (non-None) so the finally guard fires correctly.
